message:
feat(hooks): improve ratings and leaderboard data fetching

useAllRatings improvements:
- Optimize query caching and invalidation strategy
- Add better error handling for failed rating fetches
- Improve type safety

useLeaderboard improvements:
- Add sorting and filtering capabilities
- Optimize data normalization
- Improve loading state management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
